allow: Bash(source venv/bin/activate && timeout 10 uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(cd /Users/Ronoy/qa-agent-system/backend && sqlite3 qa_agent.db "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name LIKE '%knowledge%';")
Bash(sqlite3 qa_agent.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_chunks, COUNT\(embedding\) as chunks_with_embedding FROM knowledge_chunks;")
Bash(sqlite3 qa_agent.db "SELECT id, name, description FROM knowledge_bases;")
Bash(sqlite3 qa_agent.db "SELECT id, kb_id, file_name, status, chunk_count FROM knowledge_documents;")
Bash(sqlite3 qa_agent.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(embedding\) as with_embedding FROM knowledge_chunks;")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5173 2>&1 | grep -i "error\\|refused" || echo "前端正常")
